texto: It was through the private world of family that the public world of politics came alive for me: living in intimate proximity with people for whom larger questions of ideology and belief, as well as issues relating to politics and governance, were vivid daily realities.
explicacao: Citação de Sonia Gandhi sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “It was through the private world of family that the public world of politics came alive for me: l…” articula vida, family, daily em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como daily e world.
